name: shallowswe-repair-loop-preview-n3-18-v0.2-gpt-5-6-low

selection_policy.purpose: Run one low-effort GPT-5.6 Luna, Terra, and Sol row through the exact 18-task N=3 website preview matrix while preserving the July 6 540-row baseline.
notes: The task set is intentionally identical to the July 6 website-aligned 540-row preview run.
The GPT-5.6 rows are a preview extension, not final publish-grade scoring.
Use regular non-Pro Luna/Terra/Sol slugs first; defer Pro aliases until these placements are inspected.
Low effort is used because Terra and Sol high-effort probes hit an OpenRouter/OpenAI encrypted-content continuation error.
This is a feedback-seeking preview extension, not a final ShallowSWE snapshot.
The website should combine the 540 baseline rows with GPT-5.6 rows as they arrive.
Run validation should inspect preliminary trajectories immediately and stop early on verifier/task unfairness before retrying.
